text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, as I'm passing by the gym...

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Yes, that's it! Let me hear those cheers! Let all
that energy and passion burst out from the
bottom of your hearts!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Ah, that's what I'm talking about. ♪ Now for the
next song! Let's gooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm met with the bizarre sight of Seeking the Pearl
dancing onstage while surrounded by an audience
of exuberant students.

text_block_list.name: Younger Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Um... This is my first time coming to a concert,
but I had such a good time thanks to you!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, glad to hear it. Your smiles are more
precious to me than any treasure in the world.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
You must've stumbled upon my solo show on
accident, huh?

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Yep. I wanted to awaken the slumbering passion
that's hidden within everyone's hearts.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
That's why I hold these shows regularly. It's all to
get everyone active and in positive spirits!
choice_data_list: I'm not sure that's how things work...
Well, get on with the show, then!
Well, get on with the show. then!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
That's why I hold these shows regularly. It's all to
get everyone active and in positive spirits!
choice_data_list: I'm not sure that's how things work...
Well, get on with the show, then!
Well, get on with the show. then!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
You don't believe me? No worries, I won't force
you to.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
You can just sit back and let the music carry you
away. Your spirits will be lifted before you know
it.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
This next song will be my last, so let me hear you
cheer like you mean it! Here I go...

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: Mmm... Get ready for an exciting show!
